message:
style(server/tui): rustfmt tidy on tui_preset after collision-detect refactor

Pure formatting adjustment to `tui_preset.rs` after the recent
collision-detection refactor in 069d1839. Three locations where
long method signatures or `matches!` macro arguments were broken
across lines by hand are reflowed onto a single line so rustfmt
stops rewriting them on every other commit:

- `save()` collision check reflowed to single-line `if let Some(...)`
- `conflicting_name_for_path()` signature reflowed to single-line
- `assert!(matches!(result, Err(PresetError::FilenameCollision
  { .. })))` test assertion reflowed to single-line

No behavior change; `cargo fmt --check` now passes cleanly against
this file.
